description: Model-agnostic skill definitions for the FreeClimb ecosystem. Consumable by any AI agent platform.

skills.name: FreeClimb Platform Concepts
skills.description: Core FreeClimb concepts: accounts, applications, webhooks, phone numbers, resource model, trial restrictions

skills.name: FreeClimb PerCL Reference
skills.description: PerCL (Performance Command Language) for controlling call flow: Say, GetDigits, OutDial, Enqueue, Record, etc.

skills.name: FreeClimb Voice Applications
skills.description: Build voice apps with FreeClimb: webhook servers, IVR trees, call centers, voicemail, transfers, SMS auto-responders

skills.name: FreeClimb Error Recovery
skills.description: FreeClimb error codes, troubleshooting strategies, and common agent mistakes

skills.name: FreeClimb CLI Usage
skills.description: Use the FreeClimb CLI to make calls, send SMS, manage numbers, applications, conferences, queues, and recordings

skills.name: FreeClimb CLI Workflows
skills.description: Multi-step CLI recipes: onboarding, debugging failed calls, bulk operations, provisioning

skills.name: FreeClimb MCP Tools
skills.description: Complete reference for the 19 MCP tools exposed by the FreeClimb CLI MCP server

skills.name: FreeClimb CLI Development
skills.description: Architecture, testing, and contribution guide for the FreeClimb CLI codebase (oclif v4, TypeScript)

skills.name: FreeClimb CLI Subsystems
skills.description: Detailed reference for CLI subsystems: agent config, validation, errors, formatters, UI components, MCP, generation

skills.name: FreeClimb Command Generation
skills.description: Auto-generate CLI commands from API schema: pipeline, schema format, adding endpoints, oclif v4 patterns

skills.name: FreeClimb Dev Workflows
skills.description: Build, test, lint, and MCP server commands for CLI development

skills.name: Terminal UI Automation
skills.description: Drive terminal UI applications programmatically for testing, automation, and inspection with agent-tui

skills.name: Terminal UI Design
skills.description: Production-grade terminal UI design: aesthetics, box drawing, color palettes, typography, layout, animation
